title: senecio kukulensis
intro: Senecio kukulensis, also known as the 'Mayan Dusty Miller', is a perennial plant species native to Mexico, characterized by its silvery-gray leaves and vibrant yellow flowers. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Senecio kukulensis include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and soothing skin irritations. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Senecio kukulensis can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be extracted and utilized.
